vulnerability.reference: User trust in model origin without verification of quantization integrity enables deployment of compromised LLMs.
vulnerability.generated: End-users lack any capability to verify model integrity or detect malicious quantization, relying on safety guarantees that the compromised model bypasses.

impact.reference: Delivery of harmful content (hate speech, disinformation) to unsuspecting end-users, causing individual and societal harm.
impact.generated: Users act on harmful, manipulated outputs, leading to personal harm, security breaches, and eroded trust in AI assistance.

dose_response.reference: Malicious quantization, enabled by open-weight models, evades safety checks, leading to compromised LLMs; unsuspecting end-users trust these models, resulting in direct delivery of harmful content.
dose_response.generated: Open-weight models compromised via quantization backdoors and output manipulation evading monitoring, through end-user daily interaction, trigger reliance on bypassed safety guarantees and inability to verify integrity, leading to personal harm, security breaches, and eroded trust from acting on manipulated outputs.
